07_gpt2_story_en.name: GPT-2 영문 동화 생성
07_gpt2_story_en.story_en:
A children's story.

Once upon a time, there was a children ' s drawing of a girl standing next to a tree and a rabbit. The main character was girl and girl, girl eating in park. The mood was happy.

The story begins:


 • Girl goes out for walks through the woods with her friends; she sees rabbits at various places around town. One day while walking by an open field one young boy comes across two large black rats that are trying their best not get eaten. They can't escape them so they must eat each other like meat-eaters do on earth! A friend (the owner) sends his dog along but it doesn´t work as well... So he is left alone all night where only little girls watch over him - thinking nothing about what happens later which turns into trouble when things go wrong.... In short this child has lost sight… And now I am going back home again . My daughter tells me "It had been just such a lovely summer evening" She smiles happily."

08_nllb_translation_ko.name: NLLB 영한 번역
08_nllb_translation_ko.story_final: 어린이 이야기. 한 때, 나무와 토끼 옆에 소녀가 서 있는 어린이들의 그림이 있었다. 주인공은 소녀와 소녀, 공원에서 먹는 소녀였다. 분위기는 행복했다. 이야기는 다음과 같이 시작됩니다. • 소녀는 친구들과 함께 숲을 돌아다니며, 마을 주변 여러 곳에서 토끼를 보며. 어느 날 열린 마당을 지나가는 동안 어린 소년은 먹히지 않으려고 최선을 다하는 두 개의 큰 검은 쥐를 만나게 됩니다. 그들은 피할 수 없습니다. 그래서 그들은 서로 먹어야합니다. 육식하는 사람이 지구에처럼! 친구 (주) 는 자신의 개를 보내지만 잘 작동하지 않습니다. 그래서 그는 혼자 밤 내내 남아있다. 어린 소녀들만이 그를 감시 - 나중에 무슨 일이 일어날지 생각하지 않습니다. 좋은 문제가 될 때 좋은 문제가 될 것입니다. ... 짧은 시간 동안 이 어린 소년은 다시 눈을 잃었습니다. 그리고 이제 나는 다시 집에 돌아갑니다. "이런 여름 저녁이었다"라고 말했다. 내 딸은 웃음.

story_en:
A children's story.

Once upon a time, there was a children ' s drawing of a girl standing next to a tree and a rabbit. The main character was girl and girl, girl eating in park. The mood was happy.

The story begins:


 • Girl goes out for walks through the woods with her friends; she sees rabbits at various places around town. One day while walking by an open field one young boy comes across two large black rats that are trying their best not get eaten. They can't escape them so they must eat each other like meat-eaters do on earth! A friend (the owner) sends his dog along but it doesn´t work as well... So he is left alone all night where only little girls watch over him - thinking nothing about what happens later which turns into trouble when things go wrong.... In short this child has lost sight… And now I am going back home again . My daughter tells me "It had been just such a lovely summer evening" She smiles happily."

"이런 여름 저녁이었다"라고 말했다. 내 딸은 웃음.
